subject: A hooded figure in deep green robes lunges forward from shadow with arms outstretched, mouth open in a snarl or shout; a second cloaked silhouette looms behind in the murky background
description: A robed figure in heavy green hooded garments charges out of darkness toward the viewer, arms thrown wide and face contorted in a wild open-mouthed expression. Pale, almost glowing skin contrasts against the deep teal and forest-green folds of the cloak. The background is a haze of overlapping silhouettes — a second hooded figure looms behind, and indistinct shapes suggest more attackers in the gloom. The composition is tight and confrontational, the ambush captured mid-leap, with murky greens and blacks dominating the palette. The lighting is low-key and chiaroscuro, with a sickly green ambient glow lifting the central figure out of shadow.
foreground: lunging hooded figure with outstretched arms and snarling expression
background: shadowy second cloaked figure and indistinct dark shapes in murky haze
emotion: wild, aggressive, fanatical — open-mouthed shout mid-lunge
